overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through Night City's neon-drenched downtown at night. The scene features wet reflective streets, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, and moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic crossing busy intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection in front of the waiting character

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk corner holding an umbrella, waiting for the traffic signal to change while observing passing cars

notable_agents.action: black sedan with headlights on driving through the wet intersection
pedestrian with umbrella standing nearby at the corner

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with large vertical holographic advertisement displaying a figure
building facade with stacked circular neon signs in cyan and red
rain-slicked asphalt with yellow crosswalk markings reflecting neon lights
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a neon-lit intersection in Night City's downtown district. Towering skyscrapers with massive holographic advertisements dominate the skyline while wet asphalt reflects the cyan and red neon glow. Vehicles pass through the intersection as the character stands at the corner with an umbrella.

events.description: pedestrian signal changes to green walk indicator allowing crossing
character begins walking across the wide intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide intersection following the green walk signal, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: woman in purple pants and red top crossing alongside ego
futuristic sports car driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: lower level of building with blue illuminated facade and entrance canopy
orange and white construction barriers lining the street edge

segments.scene_description: The walk signal activates and the character crosses the multi-lane street alongside other pedestrians. The perspective shifts as the character moves through the crosswalk, with the blue-lit building base on the right approaching and construction barriers becoming visible ahead. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk lined with palm trees and neon buildings

events.description: moving from the open intersection onto the covered sidewalk area alongside the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and street furniture, moving past the blue building

notable_agents.action: man in white shirt walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the street against the dark sky
tall building with prominent red neon accent lighting and multiple illuminated floors
orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character walks along the sidewalk bordered by orange railings. Palm trees line the left side while the red-trimmed building dominates the view ahead. The environment transitions from the open intersection to the urban canyon of the street, with other pedestrians passing by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with heavy pedestrian crossing

events.description: approaching and entering another crosswalk with a dense group of pedestrians
crossing the street amidst a crowd of people moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a dense crowd of pedestrians, navigating through the crosswalk lines

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing together including person in distinctive red pants
yellow taxi waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to clear

entered.detail: building corner at the intersection with bright red neon trim and ground floor commercial space
pedestrian crossing signal box with illuminated walk symbol

segments.scene_description: The character reaches another busy intersection and crosses with a dense crowd of pedestrians. The crosswalk is filled with people moving in the same direction while vehicles wait at the corner. The red-accented building now appears on the left as the character moves through the crossing and continues down the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district, transitioning from a static wait at a rainy intersection to a journey through crowded urban corridors. It begins with the character standing under an umbrella at a corner, where towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements cast cyan and red reflections across the wet asphalt. As the walk signal activates, the camera moves forward across the multi-lane street, passing a blue-lit building base and construction barriers while maintaining the glow of the reflective pavement. The scene then shifts from the open intersection to a narrower urban canyon, gliding past orange railings and palm trees toward a red-trimmed building. Finally, the perspective merges into a dense crowd of pedestrians at a second busy intersection, moving past waiting vehicles and the red-accented architecture to continue deeper into the city.
